name: urf-core
boundary: Merged urf-core/main certificate transport only; theorem closure false; status promotion disallowed.
summary: Transfer Operator status lock added as certificate-transport-only infrastructure; status promotion blocked; no theorem-level closure claimed.

name: chronos-urf-rr
boundary: NormalizedRankDefect is a sufficient frontier only. FRONTIER_OPEN is preserved. No theorem-level H4.1/FGL closure. No proof of NormalizedRankDefect, RankRateGap, CountingFiberSeparation, FiberMassBalance, UniversalFiberEntropyGap, Depth Bridge, Chronos-RR, H4.1/FGL, or P vs NP is claimed.
latestUpdate: PR #128 merged NormalizedRankDefect as a sufficient frontier for RankRateGap, CountingFiberSeparation, FiberMassBalance, and UniversalFiberEntropyGap; verifier passed, targeted pytest passed, full pytest passed, and lake build passed. Previous retained marker: PR #97 SiMSLV weakest frontier lemma.
summary: NormalizedRankDefect frontier merged to main as a status-locked reduction surface; FRONTIER_OPEN preserved.

name: urf-textbook
boundary: Documentation and doctrine surface only. Frontier Calculus and related status-normalization material organize claims; they do not independently prove theorem-level closure.

name: Private/Internal Verification Surfaces
boundary: Private repository metadata is intentionally omitted; public dashboard records only externally inspectable repositories or intentionally disclosed aggregate status; no theorem-level closure is claimed unless explicitly public and inspectable.
summary: Aggregate placeholder replacing private/non-public repository rows on the public dashboard.
